action: Hermes First-Line afternoon scheduler observability repair
summary: Corrected false missing results for 2026-07-21 through 2026-07-24 and hardened the existing 16:10 afternoon task against sleep and silent failures.
issues: 2026-07-23 afternoon skill task left no durable report or output
pre-window supervision marked an unrun afternoon lane passed
stale working trees hid merged exact-date artifacts
lessons: Historical morning health must use exact-date gate and manifest evidence
afternoon supervision must refresh after the publisher exits
reusable_rules: Use origin/main exact-date artifacts when the working tree is stale
do not fabricate a missed historical afternoon archive from a later feed
notes: 2026-07-24 Business Signals remains a separate open Hermes issue.

action: Hermes FLV run ownership misclassification repair
summary: Confirmed Run 30058480613 is Business Signals, verified the 2026-07-24 afternoon report/output on origin/main, and prohibited cross-lane inference before afternoon_skill_runner handoff.
issues: Hermes attributed a Business Signals workflow to the independent FLV afternoon lane
Hermes ignored exact-date files already merged to origin/main
lessons: Workflow success or failure is evidence only for the lane that owns that workflow
reusable_rules: refresh origin/main and verify the exact-date report/output pair
Never infer afternoon failure from Business Signals or morning FLV runs
